issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (you have any DON!! cards given/attached), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!! cards). These are distinct mechanics.
Missing second action: 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active at the end of this turn' requires AttachDon action with duration constraint.
AttachDon action for the second part must include duration specification to set it active 'at the end of this turn' (likely duration: 'EndOfTurn' or deferred activation).
